getNetAccountValue().details: Used by RLDCore for solvency checks.Includes: cash + wRLP tokens + tracked TWAMM + tracked V4 LP

seize(uint256,address).details: Only callable by RLDCore during liquidation.Priority order: Cash → TWAMM → V4 LPDesign: collateralToken goes to recipient, wRLP goes to caller (Core) for burning,      other tokens stay in broker.

params.recipient: The liquidator address to receive collateral.
params.value: The value (in collateral terms) to seize.

returns.output: The amounts of collateral and wRLP extracted.

setOperator(address,bool).details: Operators can perform all actions except ownership transfer.

params.active: True to authorize, false to deauthorize.
params.operator: The address to set as operator.

getNetAccountValue().notice: Returns the total Net Asset Value of the account in collateral terms.

seize(uint256,address).notice: Seizes assets from the account during liquidation.

setOperator(address,bool).notice: Sets an operator for the Prime Broker.
